texto: You want so very much to adhere to your comfortable, uncomplicated contrasting color scheme. But that part of you that is no longer delicate, the pieces of you that have been impressed upon time and time again are making it difficult. You are beginning to understand, perhaps quite reluctantly, that life is cast in shades of grey. And that grey, whether it leans towards a lighter washed out version, or towards a never ending darkness, is not in the business of solace.
explicacao: Citação de Tamara Thiel sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “You want so very much to adhere to your comfortable, uncomplicated contrasting color scheme. But …” articula reflexao, inspirational-life, towards em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e termino.

frase_original: You want so very much to adhere to your comfortable, uncomplicated contrasting color scheme. But that part of you that is no longer delicate, the pieces of you that have been impressed upon time and time again are making it difficult. You are beginning to understand, perhaps quite reluctantly, that life is cast in shades of grey. And that grey, whether it leans towards a lighter washed out version, or towards a never ending darkness, is not in the business of solace.

texto: It’s amazing, really, how in one instant a wall can be torn down, or climbed over. Misconceptions can be shattered, illusions dashed, dreams irrevocably ruined. Given the right frame of mind, within a heartbeat, people can begin the business of starting over.
explicacao: Citação de Tamara Thiel sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “It’s amazing, really, how in one instant a wall can be torn down, or climbed over. Misconceptions…” articula motivacao, letting-go, moving-forward em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como moving-forward e moving-on.

texto: You could think that you had won. But I woke up, I came back to myself. You won nothing. I transcended you years ago, I left you in the past, I chained you up in my dreams. You may leave me shaken at times, but never again will you leave me broken. You have no power over me.
explicacao: Citação de Tamara Thiel sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “You could think that you had won. But I woke up, I came back to myself. You won nothing.
